-- Make `DiagnosticsReport.records`, `.counts`, `.pending` public; make `DiagnosticRecord` and `Counts` (and their stored properties) public. Public init NOT required.

+- Make `CodeContext.rootDirectory` public (it is `private` today, `CodeContext.swift`).  ## Acceptance Criteria

-- [ ] Upstream `swift test` remains green

+- [ ] This package's `Package.resolved` pins a `FoundationModelsCodeContext` revision containing `CodeContextManager`, `context(containing:)`, public `DiagnosticsReport` members, and public `rootDirectory`

-- [ ] Run `swift test` in ../FoundationModelsCodeContext ‚Äî expect: green
+- [ ] Upstream: `swift test` in `FoundationModelsCodeContext` ‚Äî green
+- [ ] This package: `Tests/FileToolTests/UpstreamVisibilityTests.swift` ‚Äî a compile-time probe (typealias/withExtended-lifetime style, no LSP spawn) touching the public surface above; `swift test --filter UpstreamVisibilityTests` ‚Äî green
